## Description
## Checklist
Before submitting this PR, please ensure you have completed the following:

- [ ] **NEWS:** I have updated the `NEWS.md` file.
- [ ] **Documentation:** I have updated the documentation (Roxygen2 comments).
- [ ] **Tests:** I have added tests to cover my changes or verified that existing tests pass.
- [ ] **Contributors:** I have added myself to the `DESCRIPTION` file as a contributor (if this is my first contribution).
- [ ] **Self-review:** I have performed a self-review of my own code.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update only
